trained_with: LIVE cache-XOR in the loop (re-measured every step; NOT truth-table)
honest_scope: LOAD-BEARING + FRESH/replay-proof + REAL-LLM + trained against LIVE silicon. NOT die-unique: cache-XOR is generic across shared-L3 CPUs; the per-die droop signal is too weak (BER~0.47) to root crisp bits. We do not claim uniqueness.
verdict: DEEP HONEST EMBODIMENT: a real frozen GPT-2, trained against LIVE silicon, constitutively depends on the body's real nonlinear cache computation; fresh nonce → replay fails. Uniqueness honestly NOT claimed.
